reviews.name: Etsy Customer
reviews.text: Shipping was really fast and both my stream deck+ and wave XLR snapped in with no trouble and are finally held in place. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: Etsy Customer
reviews.text:
Beware that the Facecam Neo plate lens opening is wrongly sized.  
This print doesn't fully cover the white plastic, which is essential for it to not shine through the image when using it.
The provider wasn't interested in trying to fix the design and I had to fix it by adding black tape around the opening.
Besides that, the fit of the camera mount is all good.  Just lacks attention to detail in getting the lens opening correct. Very disappointed in a custom print not being sized correctly for this camera.

reviews.name: Etsy Customer
reviews.text: Great product, I just ordered the wrong one.  He does have a separate listing for Elgato Key Light Air, my mistake.  He was very responsive and corrected the situation immediately.

reviews.name: Etsy Customer
reviews.text: Item is of good quality , went perfectly in my setup

reviews.name: Etsy Customer
reviews.text: Item arrived on time. Its exactly what it says it’s for. I bought it by mistake I have the older model but I can still use it.  Thank You.

reviews.name: Etsy Customer

reviews.name: Etsy Customer
reviews.text: Great quality and craftsmanship! I love how it fits perfectly around the Arctis Nova pro wireless hub. It also has very strong magnets that work with my secret labs magnus desk. I love how it helps things within reach and keeps my desk clear. Genius!

reviews.name: Etsy Customer
reviews.text: Exceptional fit and makes my camera so much easier to use with the current boom arm!

reviews.name: Etsy Customer
reviews.text: Love it! Perfect fit, love that I don't need the L-Bracket which saves me from extending my desk from the wall, and fast shipping.

reviews.text: Thanks, Austin. The Elgato prompter plate for the Elgato Webcam is much appreciated. Thanks for your work to make it available.
